title: ECHO - 211info
text: INSIGHTS YOUNG PARENT SERVICES ECHO Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides intensive case management and life skills services with an additional focus on hands-on parent education, child development, and ODHS advocacy. Utilizes Make Parenting a Pleasure and Parents as Teachers Curriculums. 4900 NE Glisan Street Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: Parents age 22 and younger with an open case with ODHS child welfare, are in foster care themselves, or who may not have custody of their children Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm (503) 239-6996 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main (503) 239-6996 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Multnomah County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet buses 12, 77, and 75. Near Hollywood Transit Center. Services: Case/Care Management * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Parenting Skills Classes * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - HOUSING ASSISTANCE FOR PREGNANT AND PARENTING YOUTH INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HEALTHY FAMILIES OREGON INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HOMESAFE PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENTING RESOURCES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SEEDS INFORMATION SERVICES - CHRISTINA PROJECT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
